ActionRun.action: Command to execute, only the id is required
ActionRun.parameters: Parameter values for command execution, required only when the command has parameters
ActionRun.targetSelectorType: Instance selector type, required only when the action is Execute or Save and Execute. Default: INSTANCES_LIST. Options: INSTANCES_LIST (instance list), ALL_INSTANCES (all instances), TAG_INSTANCES (instance tag selection), INSTANCES_IMPORT (instance list import)
ActionRun.targets: List of instance IDs, required only when targetSelectorType is INSTANCES_LIST
ActionRun.targetSelector.instanceType: Instance type. Enum values: BCC, BBC
ActionRun.targetSelector.importInstances: Specifies the list of instances to import as execution targets
